extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR took yellow and the stage win with late attack on final categorized climb, UAE controlled tempo from 6km out.
tactical_patterns: UAE isolated POGAČAR by drilling tempo on penultimate climb rather than final kick, atomizing peloton before decisive move.
MATTHEWS positioned fourth wheel in sprint but lacked punch against bonus-hunting GC riders, revealing sprint hierarchy shifts.
VAN AERT surrendered yellow without teammate support defending on climbs, validating early-week jersey as expendable tactical asset.
TEUNS and QUINTANA marked POGAČAR's move immediately, showing GC contenders tracking accelerations rather than protecting positions.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: Attacked with enough margin to take yellow via time bonuses, UAE tempo control 6km out isolated him perfectly.
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: Lost 2:54 on final climb with no team support, confirming limited GC ambitions beyond opportunistic jersey.
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: neutral: Fourth wheel entering sprint but beaten by GC riders hunting bonuses, positioning good but lacking explosive finish.
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: positive: Held second briefly before sprint, EF tactics targeting stage wins while protecting GC position.
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Marked POGAČAR's acceleration immediately in front group, demonstrating early-race vigilance despite no mountain terrain.
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: Present in decisive front group and improved GC position, showing surprising form retention after quiet early stages.
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: positive: Tracked POGAČAR's late acceleration, Bahrain positioning him aggressively despite modest climbing gradients.
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: Moved to fourth overall without visible effort, INEOS tempo control preserving energy while gaining positions.
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: First top-10 Tour finish for him, fifth overall represents form resurgence after early-career struggles.
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: Team already losing riders (BENNETT DNS), Bora struggling with attrition before mountain stages begin.
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: Dropped early and described as 'shell of former self', alarming GC fade before first mountain stage.
